rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ROBERT A. NAIFY LIVING TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 8, 1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant John Sherwoods (In His Individual Capacity) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Second Amended Petition For Relief For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; Third Party Liability For Breach Of Trust; And Return Of Property; Action On Rejected Creditors Claim Of Acela Cortese (Filed Oct.20,2017)
rulings.Rulings: Defendant John Sherwood's Motion to Strike the Second Amended Petition in the Robert A. Naify Living Trust matter is GRANTED. This brings the matter back to John Sherwood's Demurrer to the original Petition, as to that, the Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to demurrers 1 through 6. Appearances are required.
